full_text: Merry Christmas to everyone getting in the spirit—here in #Taiwan & around the world. ‘Tis the season, so let’s be grateful for the love & kindness that light our way. Wishing peace, health, & joy to all. https://t.co/71Kna8YyBl

At today’s Whole-of-Society Defense Resilience meeting, we reflected on the unwavering perseverance of our people through disaster response & other efforts. That spirit, built on close collaboration & int'l engagement, makes us confident in #Taiwan's civil preparedness. https://t.co/UaGFATwmaR

I extend my deepest condolences to the victims and all those affected by the horrific attack at Bondi Beach. Taiwan strongly condemns all acts of terrorism and stands with the people of Australia & the Jewish community during this difficult time.

Recent Chinese military provocations near Japan & across the region have escalated tensions & highlight the urgency of increased investments in defense. We stand together with democratic partners in opposing these actions & remain resolute in our determination to safeguard peace.

#Taiwan’s transition from authoritarianism to democracy taught us that freedom comes at a cost. On #HumanRightsDay, let's take time to reflect on history’s lessons, commemorate our hard-won progress, and together shine a light of hope for those striving for freedom. https://t.co/FMojTm1hB2

Greatly appreciate that the #US National Security Strategy prioritizes deterring a conflict over Taiwan & highlights the security of the First Island Chain. #Taiwan will continue to be a reliable partner deeply committed to strengthening our self-defense to uphold regional peace.

Enjoyed a warm meal & holiday cheer with #AIT Director Raymond Greene & our American friends. Great food & conversation, and many toasts to everything ahead for #Taiwan & the #US. Here’s to friendship, cooperation, and a stronger, more prosperous world. https://t.co/A6ODdCm0nk

Glad to meet with many great friends of #Taiwan from @NATLCOMMITTEE. While we advance defense reforms & societal resilience at home, we also look forward to building on our partnerships with the #US & other freedom-loving nations to uphold our shared values & interests. https://t.co/P2azLXGLDO

Happy to address fellow nephrologists at the Asian Pacific Congress of Nephrology today in #Taiwan. From treatment to prevention, integrated care to early screening, Taiwan is advancing in the fight against kidney disease & will keep sharing its experience for global health. https://t.co/5dqxKU5Cb2

Addressing its Open Expert Meeting, I thanked the @medwma for its longstanding support & highlighted some of #Taiwan’s many healthcare efforts. With initiatives like our AI-driven smart health system & enhanced governance, we're committed to advancing local & global well-being. https://t.co/jcyitoC1rG

Greatly appreciate President @realDonaldTrump’s signing of the Taiwan Assurance Implementation Act, underlining the importance of #US engagement with #Taiwan. Going forward, we’ll work even more closely with the US in all sectors to ensure regional peace, stability & prosperity.

Warm congratulations to Prime Minister Philip J. Pierre on his re-election. Over the years, #Taiwan & #StLucia have achieved steady progress in agriculture, economic empowerment, & more. We remain committed to deepening these efforts to advance the wellbeing of both our peoples.

My sincere congratulations to Dr. Godwin Friday as he assumes office as prime minister of St. Vincent & the Grenadines. #Taiwan & #SVG share a long & close friendship, and we look forward to deepening cooperation across key sectors to further advance development & prosperity.

#Taiwan-made & Taiwan-proud, Formosat-8 is now in orbit! We’re geared up to launch the other 7 units to complete this constellation, enhancing our disaster readiness, environmental protection & national resilience—Yet another leap forward for Taiwan's fast-growing space industry.

As #Taiwan has become a super-aged society, we’re advancing reforms to meet changing healthcare needs. Today’s Healthy Taiwan Promotion committee agenda focused on expanding accessible, community-based services for healthy ageing and upgrading our long-term care programs. https://t.co/cZjEpmsEmY

香港新界大埔昨晚發生重大火災，蔓延多棟住宅高樓。目前已有逾百人傷亡、仍有多人失蹤。所幸消防人員努力搶救，火勢已受到控制。

此時此刻，讓我們一起為香港祈福。我要為所有在災害中逝去的香港朋友、及其家屬致上最深的哀悼之意，並誠摯的慰問傷者，也希望能早日平安尋獲失蹤者。

No country is more determined in safeguarding #Taiwan’s future than our own. My @washingtonpost op-ed outlines how our unprecedented defense budget & military investments will build a stronger Taiwan as we, alongside the #US, pursue peace through strength.
https://t.co/CvgUoeKEDI

Glad to welcome Speaker Jabulani Mabuza & House of Assembly members and thank them for the solid support. #Taiwan deeply values #Eswatini's support as we continue to make great strides in energy, health, agriculture & education, with much potential to build even more prosperity. https://t.co/peyJUyjRRe

Proud to witness the launch of @Google's AI Infrastructure Engineering Center today. The opening of this new R&D center in #Taiwan highlights our growing role in global AI development, and we will keep leveraging our strengths to help build secure & trustworthy AI. https://t.co/NlzOW62dD5

Talofa! Greetings to PM Feleti Teo on his 1st state visit & 3rd time in Taiwan. Proud to witness signings of the #Taiwan-#Tuvalu Kaitasi Treaty & cooperation agreements on fisheries & sports, paving the way for a solid future partnership marked by prosperity & development. https://t.co/rMw9GjwoFQ

Glad to welcome #StKittsAndNevis PM @TerranceDrewSKN back to #Taiwan so we can personally witness our partnership deepen with new sister-city agreements and progress in medicine & health, energy & more. Let’s keep moving forward on the path to a sustainable & prosperous future. https://t.co/3j6zh3nnYY

Deeply appreciate the @G7 FMs for voicing opposition to any unilateral attempts to change the status quo in the Taiwan Strait, particularly by force or coercion. As committed as ever to a free & open Indo-Pacific, #Taiwan will keep contributing to lasting peace & stability.

I sincerely thank @ipacglobal for inviting @bikhim to speak at #IPACBrussels25 at the European Parliament. As a trusted partner to the international community, #Taiwan stands firmly with Europe & other like-minded friends to resolutely defend democracy.

Delighted to welcome the delegation led by @NC_Governor Josh Stein. With growing investment in #NorthCarolina, Taiwan looks forward to expanding cooperation—in biotech, EVs, AI & other emerging sectors—solidifying #Taiwan's economic & trade ties with the Tar Heel State & the #US. https://t.co/Ggtt6ZqgfJ
RT @takaichi_sanae: APEC首脳会議前に、控室で台湾の林信義総統府資政と挨拶を交わしました。 https://t.co/zyK55sW62S

During today's Climate Change Committee meeting, we discussed #Taiwan’s great strides on forging a resilient low-carbon future. We're redoubling efforts on promoting a circular economy & near-zero carbon buildings, & picking up the pace toward a prosperous—and sustainable—future. https://t.co/IuMGsFOA1Y

Deeply appreciate the insights from delegates to @_TheFormosaClub Annual Conference & #Taiwan-#Europe Undersea Cables Security & Cooperation Forum. Let's keep working together to align tech progress with our shared democratic values & help ensure critical infrastructure security. https://t.co/4vSjgDXyLd

A warm welcome to @AIPAC’s 1st delegation to Taiwan. As we deepen strategic partnerships, invest in advanced tech & enhance our defense capabilities, we look forward to closer #Taiwan-#US-#Israel cooperation on security, trade & beyond, promoting peace across the Taiwan Strait. https://t.co/wAGpVCEjwU

Glad to welcome @GovBillLee on his 1st visit. Taiwan & #Tennessee are innovation & industry hubs. With our MOU on economic cooperation & the state's new trade office in Taipei, I’m sure we can leverage our strengths in high tech & energy, expanding the #Taiwan-#US partnership. https://t.co/cscxs84gCr

Much appreciation to Presidential Senior Advisor Lin Hsin-i林信義, who will again represent us at the @APEC summit. I’m confident he’ll successfully convey how #Taiwan is building a sustainable tomorrow through economic resilience, human-centered innovation & global partnerships. https://t.co/rqOvIeGEtS
RT @BuckSexton: The President of Taiwan wants @realDonaldTrump to know that the people of Taiwan want peace but they’ll absolutely fight to…

Happy to welcome Governor General Sir Errol Charles on his first trip to Taiwan, especially to join us on National Day. #Taiwan & #StLucia have collaborated fruitfully in education & people-to-people exchanges, & I look forward to deepening those ties to benefit both our peoples. https://t.co/zc33m1upvM

Pleased to welcome Governor-General of #Belize Dame Froyla Tzalam to #Taiwan on our National Day. Her visit reaffirms the strong ties between our nations as we work to broaden cooperation across education, health & more, taking our diplomatic partnership to new heights. https://t.co/VFWx2XJeHt

I'd like to extend special thanks to all the foreign dignitaries who took part in this year's National Day celebrations. Our partnerships make the future brighter, and the people & government of #Taiwan are deeply grateful for your support. https://t.co/esMhBEboJp

My sincere thanks to all the friends of #Taiwan celebrating National Day with us. I’ll soon be delivering my National Day Address—tune in live here:
https://t.co/D4KPhoizCO https://t.co/JtXV1NyWlR

Today, on National Day, we celebrate the remarkable achievements & resilience of #Taiwan & our people, who continue to propel our nation forward. Watch the livestream of our annual celebration here:
https://t.co/D4KPhoizCO https://t.co/8dRgze6eXA

We sincerely welcome the agreement reached on the first phase of President Trump’s ceasefire plan for Gaza and commend @POTUS’s remarkable leadership & tireless efforts. #Taiwan holds firm in the hope that peace will prevail & endure globally.

Delighted to meet former #Australia PM Scott Morrison @ScoMo30 & distinguished guests who attended the Taipei Security Dialogue. #Taiwan is as determined as ever to defend itself & will continue to enhance asymmetric capabilities through our commitment to peace through strength. https://t.co/eeMYr9QxZq

Speaking with @BuckSexton for the @clayandbuck show, I noted that #Taiwan's most beautiful scenery is its people. Exceptional warmth & kindness make our society resilient. We also cherish our freedom & we’re investing more in defense while deepening our partnership with the #US.
RT @clayandbuck: Taiwan President @ChingteLai tells @BuckSexton how Taiwan is boosting its birth rate: "Actually, Taiwan's policies were ma…
RT @clayandbuck: Taiwan President @ChingteLai describes what he considers Taiwan's greatest strength to @BuckSexton: "Taiwan is often laude…
RT @clayandbuck: 🚨Taiwan President @ChingteLai gives @BuckSexton his message for @realdonaldtrump: "I would suggest that he take note of th…

Wishing all in #Taiwan & around the world who celebrate the #MidAutumnFestival a wonderful holiday filled with “mochi” joy, warmth & time with loved ones. May you all enjoy delightful foods under the peaceful glow of the full moon. https://t.co/lLbAl3biyu

Great meeting with @BuckSexton & @YatesComms to discuss Taiwan’s key role in the world. Many thanks for your positive remarks about #Taiwan—we pride ourselves in the kindness & hospitality of our people. I look forward to the interview airing on @clayandbuck on Monday.

Like many in Taiwan, I am grieved to learn of Dr. Jane Goodall's passing. We met in Tainan when I was mayor, and she told me her hope that stewards would keep watch over the local Erren River, where restoration was ongoing. Her work still inspires Taiwan's environmental efforts.

I extend sincere condolences on behalf of the people of Taiwan to all impacted by the devastating earthquake in the Philippines. Our hearts are with all those who are grieving, and we pray for swift and successful rescue efforts.

Glad to welcome Under Secretary of Agriculture Luke Lindberg @TheUSA back to Taiwan. As the US moves to open its market to Taiwan pineapples🍍 & we expand cooperation in agricultural tech & food security, we look forward to new momentum in our trade relations. #FreedomPineapples https://t.co/iamegNvhrH

Many thanks to #StKittsAndNevis PM @TerranceDrewSKN for his statement at #UNGA80 that including #Taiwan in the WHO, ICAO & other international orgs strengthens global public health, technology & disaster response. Taiwan stands ready to contribute wherever our expertise can help.

My sincere appreciation to PM Feleti Teo of #Tuvalu for recognizing #Taiwan's contributions to global development & for supporting our international participation. We cherish our longstanding partnership with Tuvalu, grounded in the commitment to promoting peace & prosperity.

Deeply appreciate the support from PM @JohnBricenoBZE, who at #UNGA80 advocated for #Taiwan’s role in the int’l community. With #Belize & other like-minded partners, we’ll continue sharing tech & expertise, boosting supply chain security & driving sustainable growth worldwide.

Sincere thanks to PM Ralph Gonsalves of #SVG for reaffirming at #UNGA80 the importance of peace in the Taiwan Strait & supporting #Taiwan’s international participation. We’ll keep working with our partners worldwide to advance global health, climate action & shared prosperity.

Deep appreciation to #Eswatini King Mswati III for his remarks at #UNGA80 in support of #Taiwan’s international participation. #TaiwanCanHelp by contributing to global development, & we'll continue working alongside our partners to advance prosperity.

Deepest thanks to our longtime friend #Palau President @Surangeljr, who at #UNGA80 urged an end to the misinterpretation of UN Resolution 2758 & advocated for #Taiwan’s voice to be heard. We aspire to contribute even more globally & are heartened by your call for inclusivity.

I thank President Heine for her powerful words at #UNGA80 speaking up for #Taiwan’s role in the SDGs & regional peace, and speaking out against distortions of UN Resolution 2758. Together with the #MarshallIslands, we will keep working to advance peace & development.

Sincere thanks to @prezidentpavel for highlighting at #UNGA80 the importance of peace in the Taiwan Strait to global security & trade. We look forward to continue working with #Czechia, a steadfast partner of #Taiwan in Europe, to safeguard freedom & regional stability.

Great to welcome @IIPS_org Chair Randy Schriver back to #Taiwan & hear the delegation's valuable insights. As we strengthen our indigenous defense capabilities, we will also expand cooperation with the #US on security, trade, & technology to ensure regional peace & stability. https://t.co/BwOFEoepmL

A warm welcome to all our friends at the resilience committee's 1st int'l forum. A year in, we’ve built greater preparedness across #Taiwan. With our new public safety guide & resilience budget, we are committed to our goal of Peace through Strength; Strength through Resilience. https://t.co/XbA9o8xbIA

Pleased to welcome the @KnessetENG delegation led by @BToporovsky, whose strong support for #Taiwan’s global participation we deeply value. We look forward to working with #Israel on semiconductors, AI, & emerging defense tech to boost innovation & supply chain resilience. https://t.co/hMrjEmkc51

Delighted to welcome Ambassador Meighan–our dear friend & alum of Taiwan’s Nat’l Chengchi University–to her new post. With her valuable experience, I'm confident #Taiwan & #Belize will make great strides in education, gender equality, economic cooperation, & beyond. https://t.co/LKfE3lehlk

Happy to welcome Ambassador Penn @pennayiti of #Haiti back to #Taiwan on his 2nd assignment. His outstanding record of service gives me full confidence that our nations' partnership will continue to flourish in agriculture, energy, culture & beyond. https://t.co/PV7qEciggt

Today, the Healthy Taiwan Promotion Committee advanced plans to leverage Taiwan’s strengths in AI high-tech & biomedicine. We're dedicating NT$10 billion to smart healthcare startups so that #Taiwan’s contributions can go global, fostering better care for all. https://t.co/JVk2UOWjgr

Thrilled to congratulate 3 champion teams today! Tung-Yuan Elementary for their Little League World Series win, Chung-Shan Jr. High for their 4th world title & our U15 team for back-to-back Asian Championship titles. These heroes have shown the world what #Taiwan ⚾️ is made of. https://t.co/Kbt4Poolyf

Delighted to welcome Deputy PM Hilaire of #SaintLucia back to #Taiwan. From agriculture & education to health & infrastructure, our nations' partnership is flourishing. We look forward to deepening our ties, driving prosperity at home & globally. https://t.co/zOgJVLjNO2

On #Taiwan's #ArmedForcesDay, we look back on 80 years after the end of WWII, reminded again that aggression fails & unity prevails. We thank the defenders of the peace we cherish & believe firmly that military strength should be used for defense—not expansionist ambitions. https://t.co/Gfzf4M0QIn

Glad to meet with Speaker Italeli & his delegation after greeting them at the Asian-Pacific Parliamentarians’ Union assembly last week. Whether in education, health, or talent cultivation, #Taiwan & #Tuvalu will keep expanding cooperation for mutual prosperity & development. https://t.co/PCc5luZ9ZO

Glad to welcome Senate Armed Services Committee Chair @SenatorWicker & @SenatorFischer and thank the committee for supporting Taiwan through concrete actions. Your visit demonstrates the continuity of #Taiwan-#US security cooperation, a cornerstone of regional peace. https://t.co/HjQJFK4Vlf

We thank the #UK & #Japan for reaffirming at their Defense Ministerial Meeting the importance of peace & stability in the Taiwan Strait. #Taiwan appreciates the support & is ever committed to enhancing deterrence together with global partners to uphold regional security.

Warmest welcome to our @IPACglobal friends. At IPAC’s landmark summit last year, lawmakers passed a motion countering China’s use of lawfare to limit #Taiwan's int'l participation, inspiring global support. We're grateful for IPAC’s principled actions & stand united for freedom. https://t.co/bBHuLP2Lsy

My warmest congratulations to Tung-Yuan Little League, our @LittleLeague World Series champions! Representing the Asia-Pacific, you’ve made the region proud & marked a new chapter in #Taiwan's baseball story for the whole world to see—Three cheers for the team!⚾️

Visiting our Navy's 168th fleet today, I announced that in addition to defense spending reaching 3.32% of GDP in 2026, we are also aiming to achieve 5% of GDP by 2030. By strengthening defense capabilities, #Taiwan is serious in its commitment to peace through strength. https://t.co/aOgmURoVGA
